---
pagetitle: "Venue Information"
toc: false
---


## Venue Information

The workshop takes place in the Mandeville building on the [Woudestein campus](https://www.eur.nl/en/media/2024-12-230794campusplattegrondv6) 
of the [Erasmus University Rotterdam](https://www.eur.nl/en). 

Building: **Mandeville** <br/>
Room: **T13-67** (13th floor)

### Street Address

Department of Psychology, Education and Child Studies<br/>
Erasmus University Rotterdam<br/>
Burgemeester Oudlaan 50<br/>
3062 PA Rotterdam


```{=html}
<iframe width="100%" height="350" src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=4.523792266845704%2C51.913567499362514%2C4.528545141220094%2C51.91800800965483&amp;layer=mapnik&amp;marker=51.91579111827799%2C4.526163339614868" style="border: 1px solid black"></iframe><br/><small><a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/?mlat=51.915791&amp;mlon=4.526163#map=17/51.915788/4.526169">View Larger Map</a></small>
```
